products.name: 2Fitty Core Heavyweight Hoodie
products.shortDescription: Relaxed, slightly oversized heavyweight hoodie with subtle 2F branding.
products.description: The 2Fitty Core Heavyweight Hoodie is cut in a relaxed, slightly oversized fit with dropped shoulders and a structured hood. Finished with subtle embroidered 2F branding on the chest, a kangaroo pocket, and ribbed cuffs and hem for a clean, everyday shape.
products.fit: Relaxed, slightly oversized fit with dropped shoulders.
products.materials: [420 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Do not iron on print/embroidery].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed oversized fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: 2Fitty Core Relaxed Sweatpants
products.shortDescription: Relaxed-taper fleece sweatpants that pair with the Core Heavyweight Hoodie.
products.description: The 2Fitty Core Relaxed Sweatpants feature a relaxed-through-the-thigh, tapered-at-the-ankle silhouette in soft brushed fleece. An elastic drawstring waistband and ribbed ankle cuffs keep the fit clean, with a small embroidered 2F mark at the hip. Designed to be worn alone or matched with the Core Heavyweight Hoodie as a set.
products.fit: Relaxed through the thigh, tapered at the ankle.
products.materials: [420 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed, tapered fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: Fifty Graphic Hoodie
products.shortDescription: Oversized hoodie with a large front graphic and statement branding.
products.description: The Fifty Graphic Hoodie is built in an oversized fit with dropped shoulders, finished with a large printed graphic across the chest and a bold embroidered '50' at the back yoke. Heavyweight fleece construction with a double-lined hood and front pocket for everyday wear.
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Do not iron on graphic].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Oversized fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: Fifty Oversized T-Shirt
products.shortDescription: Boxy, oversized tee with a large back-print graphic.
products.description: The Fifty Oversized T-Shirt is cut boxy and oversized in heavyweight cotton, with a large printed graphic across the back and a smaller '50' mark on the chest. Dropped shoulders and a straight hem keep it easy to layer or wear on its own.
products.fit: Boxy, oversized fit with dropped shoulders.
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Do not iron on print].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Boxy oversized fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: After Hours Washed Hoodie
products.shortDescription: Garment-washed hoodie in a muted, darker colourway.
products.description: The After Hours Washed Hoodie is garment-dyed and washed for a softer, muted charcoal finish. Cut in a relaxed fit with a structured hood, dropped shoulders, and a tonal embroidered 2F mark at the chest for understated, darker-toned branding.
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Wash separately for first wash].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: After Hours Wide-Leg Sweatpants
products.shortDescription: Wide-leg fleece sweatpants in a muted, darker colourway.
products.description: The After Hours Wide-Leg Sweatpants feature a straight, wide-leg cut in garment-washed fleece with an elastic drawstring waistband and side pockets. A tonal embroidered 2F mark sits at the hip for subtle, darker-toned branding.
products.fit: Wide-leg, relaxed fit through the leg.
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Wash separately for first wash].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Wide-leg relaxed fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: 2Fitty Core Fleece Shorts
products.shortDescription: Relaxed above-the-knee fleece shorts with a small 2F mark.
products.description: The 2Fitty Core Fleece Shorts are cut in a relaxed, above-the-knee length in soft brushed fleece, with an elastic drawstring waistband and side pockets. A small embroidered 2F mark sits at the hip for clean, minimal branding.
products.materials: [380 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: Signature Hoodie and Sweatpants Set
products.shortDescription: Matching heavyweight hoodie and sweatpants set, sold as one coordinated outfit.
products.description: The Signature Hoodie and Sweatpants Set pairs the 2Fitty Core Heavyweight Hoodie with the 2Fitty Core Relaxed Sweatpants in a matching colourway, so both pieces are cut from the same heavyweight fleece with matching embroidered 2F branding. Purchase as a complete set, or request the hoodie or sweatpants separately through the order form notes.
products.materials: [420 GSM cotton fleece blend], [80% cotton, 20% polyester]
products.careInstructions: [Machine wash cold, inside out]. [Tumble dry low]. [Wash separately for first wash].
products.sizeGuideInfo: Relaxed oversized fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit or size down for a closer fit.

products.name: 2F Embroidered Cap
products.description: The 2F Embroidered Cap is a structured 6-panel cap with a curved brim, embroidered 2F branding on the front panel, and an adjustable strap back for a comfortable, one-size-fits-most fit. A simple way to finish off any 2Fitty outfit.

products.name: Fifty Varsity Jacket
products.shortDescription: Varsity-style jacket with embroidered Fifty branding.
products.description: The Fifty Varsity Jacket takes a classic varsity silhouette with ribbed collar, cuffs and hem, snap-button front closure, and embroidered '50' branding on the chest and back. Built as a statement outerwear piece for the Fifty Series lineup.
products.careInstructions: [Dry clean only]. [Do not iron on embroidery].
products.sizeGuideInfo: True-to-size fit. Select your regular size for the intended fit.
